metadata.file_name: A Taste Of Honey - Boogie Oogie Oogie (Single Version  Remastered 2002).flac
metadata.title: Boogie Oogie Oogie (Single Version / Remastered 2002)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:47.52] If you're thinkin' you're too cool to boogie
[00:55.31] Boy oh boy, have I got news for you
[01:02.92] Everybody here tonight must boogie
[01:09.99] Let me tell ya, you are no exception to the rule
[01:17.47] Get on up on the floor
[01:21.25] 'Cause we're gonna boogie oogie oogie
[01:23.94] Till you just can't boogie no more [(no more boogie)]
[01:29.01] Boogie no more
[01:31.85] You can't boogie no more [(no more boogie)]
[01:36.50] Boogie no more, listen to the music
[01:57.48] There's no time to waste, let's get this show on the road
[02:04.56] Listen to the music and let your body flow
[02:12.69] The sooner we begin, the longer we've got to groove
[02:20.54] Listen to the music and let your body move
[02:27.08] Now get on up on the floor
[02:31.02] 'Cause we're gonna boogie oogie oogie
[02:33.55] Till you just can't boogie no more [(no more boogie)]
[02:39.06] Boogie no more
[02:41.61] You can't boogie no more [(no more boogie)]
[02:46.65] Boogie no more, listen to my bass here
[03:07.65] Get down, boogie oogie oogie
[03:10.83] Get down, boogie oogie oogie
[03:14.88] Get down, boogie oogie oogie
[03:18.84] Get down
[03:29.19] Boogie!
[03:38.72]
